description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a penguin, featuring a rounded body with a soft, velvety texture. The toy has a dark gray head and wings, contrasted by a white belly and face, and a large, pale yellow beak and matching webbed feet. Its eyes are small, round, and black, giving it a gentle and approachable appearance. The wings are slightly outstretched, and the body is plump, suggesting it is filled with a lightweight, compressible material. There are no visible seams or accessories, and the overall construction appears smooth and well-finished. The toy is small enough to be easily carried or hugged by a child and would likely be found in urban parks, playgrounds, or residential areas.
description: A soft, plush penguin stuffed toy with a dark gray head and wings, white belly, and yellow beak and feet. It has a rounded, cuddly shape and a gentle, friendly expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the penguin's face, beak, white belly, and both outstretched wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the beak, one eye, and the curve of the wing and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both wings, and the dark gray coloration with a hint of the white underside.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the back of the head, one wing, and a partial view of the face and beak.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with small, round black eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is sitting upright with its wings slightly outstretched and feet positioned forward, giving it a stable and welcoming posture.
